message.content:

Failing test: "should add 50% curse surcharge on the cursed item's base premium (cursed sword → 100 + 50 + 5 = 155 G)"
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_01-15-57_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts

EXPERIMENT MODE: Add curse surcharge (item.cursed → +0.5 × base). Apply to non-component items for now (the only test case requires sword). Proceed to Refactor.

content.text: I'll analyze the failing test and implement minimal code to make it pass.
Now I'll add minimal curse surcharge logic to non-component items.

input.old_string:
const nonComponentBaseFor = (items: Item[]): number =>
  items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + BASE_PREMIUM_BY_ITEM_TYPE[item.type], 0);

content.content: The file /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_01-15-57_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts has been updated successfully.

content.text:
All 13 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: Added curse surcharge logic in `nonComponentBaseFor`: when `item.cursed` is true, adds `base * 0.5` to the sum (in addition to base).
**Result**: All tests now pass (13 passing, 32 todo)
**Approach**: Minimal modification — only altered `nonComponentBaseFor` to read `item.cursed` and conditionally add 50% of the item's base premium. Did not touch components (no test demands it). Did not extract helpers or generalize for future surcharges (enchantment, etc.) — those are deferred to their respective Red phases.

File modified: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_01-15-57_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
